    classical
    -- Use the empty set as a trivial subset of A
    use ∅
    constructor
    · -- Prove that the empty set is a subset of A
      simp [Set.empty_subset]
    · -- Prove that the sum over the empty set is 1 (this is trivially true)
      simp
  exact h₁
